content.problemStatement:
You are given a Student class having name and age as attributes and a display method. This class also has a parameterized constructor having name and age as parameters to initialize the value of name and age of student respectively. 

Given name and age as input, Create a student class, initialize the values and then print the information of Student using display method.


Input Format

First line contain a string representing name of the student.
Second line contain a integer representing age of the student.


Output Format
Print the information of the student using display method.
content.inputFormat: The first line contains the student's name (a string of length 1 to 100, may contain spaces). The second line contains the student's age (an integer between 1 and 150).
content.outputFormat: Print the student's name on the first line and the age on the second line.

sampleTestCases.explanation: The name is 'Alice' and the age is 12, printed exactly as required.
The name is 'Bob' and the age is 25.
The name is 'Charlie' and the age is 30.

solution.approach: Read the name and age, create an instance of the Student class using its parameterized constructor, then call the display method which prints the stored name and age. The algorithm is O(1) time and O(1) extra space.
